title: Flagstaff, AZ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Flagstaff is a city in AZ with a population of 76,000. Mountain town at 7,000 feet with skiing, hiking, and Lowell Observatory under dark skies.
